important_dates.interview_date: Will be displayed on Institute website

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation applicable for OBC, SC, ST etc. as per Government of India regulations.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree (1st class) in Microbiology/Biotechnology, M.Sc in Microbiology/Biotechnology (Desirable)
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Bachelor's Degree (1st class) in Microbiology/Biotechnology from a recognized college/University. Desirable: M.Sc in Microbiology/Biotechnology, Knowledge of working with methanotrophs, performing pot & field experiments, Experience of one or more years in the relevant field.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ARI Pune Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment is 30-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline to be considered.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant post will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree (1st class) in Microbiology or Biotechnology. An M.Sc in the same fields is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant post announced in this recruitment drive by ARI Pune.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 100 for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an offline interview.

faq.question: Q8. When will the offline interview for the Project Assistant post be conducted?
faq.answer: The offline interview for the Project Assistant post is scheduled to be conducted on 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment is completely online.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
